# Confab

> Confab is a macOS menubar app for spoken conversations with a room of AI advisors.
> They talk to you and to each other, out loud, so one viewpoint is never enough.
> Part of the LogicaLeap product family.

## About
Confab lives in your Mac's menu bar. Open it and a few AI advisors join a live voice
room. You talk; they answer in their own voices, hand the thread to whoever is better
placed, push back, and build on each other. The belief it is built on: one confident
answer is easy to act on and easy to get wrong, so a room that disagrees on purpose gets
you to a better answer. It is not a companion bot and not a single smarter assistant.

## The cast
Confab ships with more than a hundred advisors across nineteen teams, including Software,
Marketing, Leadership, Accounting, Legal, Personal Finance, Home & Garden, Consumer Focus
Group, and Manufacturing & Operations. By default a small set is in the room and the rest wait backstage. Sage is the
moderator and can pull in any team by voice ("bring in the marketing team", "swap legal for
finance", "just Sage for now"). Each advisor has its own name, role, and voice.

## How it works
- Talk and listen by voice. Speech is understood on-device. Replies are spoken in built-in
  neural voices, a distinct one per advisor.
- Cut in any time. Start speaking and the room stops to listen. Interrupting never throws
  away work in progress.
- Background tasks. An advisor can take a longer job and run it on the side while the
  conversation keeps going.
- Two listening modes: always-on, and press-to-talk.
- Headphones recommended for the most natural back-and-forth.

## Requirements
- A recent version of macOS (it relies on newer Apple speech features).
- An active Claude Pro or Max subscription. Confab runs through the official `claude`
  command-line tool you log into yourself. There is no separate API key and no extra
  per-token cost. Requests go straight from your Mac to Anthropic.
- Your conversation history stays local on your machine. No cloud sync.

## Pricing
Confab has a free trial that starts the moment you download it. Requesting a key on the
site adds another week of trial. A one-time purchase, with no subscription to Confab
itself, is coming. Purchasing is not live yet. See the License page (/purchase).

## Download
- macOS DMG from GitHub Releases: https://github.com/logicaleap/confab/releases/latest

## Pages
- Home (https://confab.logicaleap.com/): Overview of Confab, the cast, what happens in the
  room, requirements, and the download.
- Why a room (https://confab.logicaleap.com/why): Why several AI advisors with different
  points of view beat one confident answer. A single model gives the safe, middle answer that
  agrees with your question; Confab puts crafted points of view in the room so the angles and
  the disagreement surface out loud, and you never have to learn how to ask.
- License (https://confab.logicaleap.com/purchase): How licensing works. Free trial on
  download, an extra week of trial when you request a key, and a one-time purchase (no
  subscription) that is coming. Purchasing is not live yet.

## Family
- LogicaLeap (https://logicaleap.com): The software studio behind Confab.

## Contact
- Web: https://confab.logicaleap.com
- Family: https://logicaleap.com
